Meet Dentists

Led by passion and years of clinical excellence, our doctors are committed to your smile's future.

Dr. Aye Myat Kaung

General Dentist

D'Lux TeamGeneral Dentist

Dr. Aye Myat Kaung provides attentive general dental care with a focus on clear communication, comfort, and long-term oral health.

Focus Areas

Preventive dental care and patient education

Restorative treatment planning

Comfort-focused appointments for routine and ongoing care

Dr. Aye Pwint Phyu

General Dentist

D'Lux TeamGeneral Dentist

Dr. Aye Pwint Phyu helps patients feel informed and at ease while delivering reliable care for healthy, confident smiles.

Focus Areas

Comprehensive dental examinations

Tooth-colored restorative care

Personalized smile maintenance plans

Dr. Lin Lae Lae Naing

General Dentist

D'Lux TeamGeneral Dentist

Dr. Lin Lae Lae Naing supports patients with gentle, detail-oriented dentistry backed by modern tools and thoughtful follow-up.

Focus Areas

Routine dentistry and oral hygiene guidance

Digital diagnostics and treatment coordination

Patient comfort during each stage of care

Dr. Ei Khine Min

General Dentist

D'Lux TeamGeneral Dentist

Dr. Ei Khine Min brings a calm, patient-first approach to general dentistry, helping every visit feel simple and well explained.

Focus Areas

Preventive and restorative care

Smile health consultations

Ongoing care for patients and families
